en_body:
How strangely light this longing, breathing fragrance
I tie a bow around the verse with a thread of smoke
Wrap the shivering Love inside a breath
Burn the Love poem with a silken sound
A sneeze, a secret gladness, watching for the one who watches
Is there someone, someone there, also longing?
The breath floats lightly, veiling the dream
White thoughts wandering, dawn turns rose.
note: The sneeze invokes a Vietnamese folk belief that someone far away is remembering or speaking of you.
